title: Incredibly Scary
description: A carefully crafted Forge 1.20.1 modpack with 100+ mods that make your Minecraft expierience much scarier.
body:
# **Banner**
![Incredibly Scary Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f4852de1d19f5b2fed9da37499ed651e7607c4_0.webp)

**Loader**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Scary** modpack is supported by the **Forge** mod loader.
> To get the **Incredibly Modified** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-modified).

> To get the **Incredibly Mechanised** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-mechanised).

**Mods**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Scary** modpack contains **100+ mods** that will make your Minecraft expierience a lot scarier.

**Features**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Incredibly Scary** modpack offers:

✔️ Scarier caves

✔️ Shader support

✔️ New dimensions

✔️ New blocks

✔️ New mechanics

✔️ New structures

✔️ New scary biomes

✔️ New scary mobs

✔️ Herobrine...

✔️ Dwellers...

✔️ & much more...

**Installation**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Download a Minecraft launcher of your choice ([AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app))

> Login to the laucher

> Search for the **Incredibly Scary** modpack

> Click install

> Choose the newest version

> You have succesfully installed it!

**Links**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> [SpaceOn](https://modrinth.com/user/SpaceOn) - Owner

> [Moderon](https://discord.gg/hZfz2vtjAV) - Discord
